ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the incentive */,
  "incentive_type" TEXT /* Type of incentive (e.g., discount, free ride) */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward offered by the incentive */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the incentive expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id")
)
column_names: ID of the user receiving the incentive
Type of incentive (e.g., discount, free ride)
